summary.what_built: This module creates a new API endpoint that returns a mock portfolio snapshot in JSON format.
summary.problem: It provides a way to access current portfolio data through an API.
summary.risk: Medium risk due to reliance on hardcoded values and lack of actual data retrieval logic, which could lead to incorrect information being served.
summary.validation: The code has been checked for syntax errors and basic functionality.
summary.on_apply: When the operator clicks Apply, the new endpoint will be added to the Flask application and will respond with the mock portfolio data.
summary.uncertainty: It is uncertain how this mock data will be received by users and whether it meets their needs for actual portfolio information.
